name: AdvNav: Behavior-Guided Black-Box Adversarial Attacks on Vision-Language Navigation

description: arXiv:2607.11063v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite progress in Embodied AI, Vision-and-Language Navigation systems remain vulnerable to adversarial visual disturbances. Most existing methods rely on white-box access to target model gradients, which is often unrealistic for real-world deployed systems and computationally exhaustive due to recursive backpropagation for optimization, limiting...
author: Chenyang Li, Kaige Li, Zeyu Jiang, Changhao Chen
